subject: Fw: Screening room plan and imagery
body:
I don't get it,, i don't want their decoration   and now the building is 100 feet long

----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, October 22, 2007 3:53:38 PM
Subject: FW: Screening room plan and imagery


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: Warwick Wicksman [mailto:warwick_wicksman@gensler.com] 
Sent: Friday, October 19, 2007 2:43 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: Doug Schoettle; Irwin Miller
Subject: Screening room plan and imagery


Lesley,
The attached revised images and plan are for Mr. Epstein's review for the Screening Room at the Island.  These files include some new reference images for furniture and finishes.  We would appreciate some initial feedback from Mr. Epstein before we complete the revised design package.
Thanks,
Warwick Wicksman
